CustomField.description: Returns the number of business days projected for the completion of a documentation event based on the name.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(pro_Documentation_Event_Type__c, "1 Engage Law Firm"), "1", IF( ISPICKVAL(pro_Documentation_Event_Type__c, "2 Initial Draft"), "4", IF( ISPICKVAL(pro_Documentation_Event_Type__c, "3 Review & Comment"), "3", "2" ) ) )
CustomField.label: Projected Business Days
